title: EverPass Briefs (Private)
description: Ryan's automated EverPass morning and end-of-day audio briefs.
author: EverPass
_comment_block: block=yes keeps this PRIVATE feed out of the public Apple/Spotify directory while you can still subscribe by URL. Set block=no ONLY if you actually want it publicly listed.
_comment_base_url: base_url is the folder the .mp3 files are served from. Enclosure URLs are base_url + filename. It MUST be absolute https.
_comment_image_url: image_url must point at a real, reachable square cover image 1400-3000px (JPG/PNG). Apple/Spotify reject feeds without one. Upload cover.jpg next to the mp3s.

episodes._comment: OPTIONAL per-file overrides keyed by exact mp3 filename. Omit entirely to derive everything (title/date/pubDate/duration) automatically from the file.

morning-2026-06-29.mp3.title: EverPass Morning Brief — 2026-06-29
morning-2026-06-29.mp3.summary: Top of the EverPass pipeline for Monday, June 29.
